name: Clerk
tagline: Manage users in a Clerk instance
description: List, search, and retrieve users from a Clerk application through the Backend API.

auth.hint: Use the Clerk Secret Key from the API Keys page in the Clerk Dashboard as the bearer token.

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: List or search users in the Clerk instance.

params.name: query
params.description: Partial match across user ID, email, phone, username, web3 wallet, first name, and last name.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of users to return, from 1 through 500; defaults to 10.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of users to skip for offset pagination; defaults to 0.

params.name: order_by
params.description: Supported sort field prefixed with + for ascending or - for descending; defaults to -created_at.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Retrieve one Clerk user by identifier.
